name: pi-loom
description: Unified Pi Loom package for durable constitutional, research, initiative, specification, planning, ticket, critique, Ralph orchestration, documentation, and storage workflows.

scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts biome.json README.md constitution critique docs initiatives plans ralph research specs storage ticketing
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts biome.json README.md constitution critique docs initiatives plans ralph research specs storage ticketing
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.check:ci: biome ci package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts biome.json README.md constitution critique docs initiatives plans ralph research specs storage ticketing && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
